editorial.overview: 8 main auto sets plus 2 case-hits. 241 unique signers span 2025 NBA rookies, returning NBA stars, the 2026 NCAA-M draft class, and the WCBB elite. Chrome Autographs and Chrome Prospect Autographs anchor the hardsigned rainbow. Timeless Touch delivers stars at the easiest odds (1:72 Hobby). Opening Statement is the rookies-only chase. Retrofractor sneaks Shaquille O'Neal in on an LSU throwback 1/1. THE HEADLINE STORY: three of the top seven 2025 NBA picks — VJ Edgecombe (#3), Tre Johnson III (#6), and Jeremiah Fears (#7) — have zero autograph cards in the entire product despite appearing in base and inserts. Likely Panini-exclusive auto contracts. Effectively shrinks the high-pick NBA rookie auto field to Flagg, Harper, Knueppel, and Bailey.

tierExplanations.tier1: The Faces — 2025 NBA top-3 picks plus the two projected 2026 #1 candidates, plus Shaq's Retrofractor legend inclusion. These autos anchor hobby demand regardless of market.
tierExplanations.tier2: Strong Co-Stars — NBA picks #4-#7, the next tier of 2026 NCAA prospects, and the three WCBB superstars (Watkins, Booker, Strong). Demand-proven names with real market presence.
tierExplanations.tier3: Sleepers — role-player NBA rookies with upside, transfer-portal NCAA veterans, mid-tier 2026 prospects, and WCBB stars outside the top 3. Upside bets where hits below MSRP are the target.
tierExplanations.tier4: The Rest — established NBA veterans with saturated auto supply, deeper NCAA rosters, and long-tail inclusions. Lottery-ticket territory on individual names.

sets.name: Chrome Autographs
sets.description: The brand's hardsigned staple — NBA rookies and veterans on Chrome stock. Full rainbow from Refractor to SuperFractor /1.
sets.editorial: The anchor auto program. Flagg, Harper, Edgecombe, Bailey, Knueppel all sign here. SuperFractor /1 is the premier 1-of-1 chase.

sets.name: Chrome Prospect Autographs
sets.description: The NCAA counterpart to Chrome Autographs — 1st Bowman autos for the 2026 draft class and WCBB stars.
sets.editorial: Where long-term upside lives. Dybantsa, Peterson, Wilson, Ament sign here as 1st Bowman autos. Watkins, Booker, Strong anchor the women's side.

sets.name: Retrofractor Autograph Variation
sets.description: Legend-tier throwback design using college-era photography of basketball icons.
sets.editorial: Shaq in LSU purple-and-gold autographed 1/1s live here. This is Rip Report's hidden-gem pick — one signer, one card, multiple parallel tiers.

sets.name: Future Script
sets.boxGuarantee: Pack odds only — no per-box guarantee
sets.description: New 25-card NCAA-prospect auto set with an inscribed/script design.
sets.editorial: NCAA-focused auto insert. Dybantsa and top prospects get secondary auto exposure beyond Chrome Prospect Autographs.

sets.name: Buzz Factor Autographs
sets.boxGuarantee: Pack odds only — no per-box guarantee
sets.description: New 25-card NCAA-prospect auto set — the 'buzzy' name tier.
sets.editorial: Skews toward women's basketball. Watkins, Crump, McMahon, Kaufman-Renn show up here for secondary auto availability.

sets.name: Opening Statement Signatures
sets.boxGuarantee: Pack odds only — no per-box guarantee
sets.editorial: Exclusively 2025 NBA rookies. Flagg, Bailey, Edgecombe, Knueppel, Coward, Yang Hansen all here. If you want rookie autos in a smaller checklist than Chrome Autographs, this is the target.

sets.name: Timeless Touch Signatures
sets.boxGuarantee: Pack odds only — no per-box guarantee
sets.description: 25-card NBA star/veteran auto set — the highest-frequency auto pull.
sets.editorial: The easiest auto pull by odds (1:72 Hobby). Wemby, Cade, Edey, Risacher. Lots of supply, lower individual card value, but accessible entry point for NBA star auto collectors.

sets.name: Bowman Dual Autographs
sets.description: Pairs of signers on one card — approximately 10 dual cards. NCAA focus.
sets.editorial: Dybantsa + Peterson on one card is the chase. Sienna Betts + Sarah Strong pairs the two top women's freshmen. Top-tier case-hit territory.

sets.name: Paper Prospect Retail Autographs
sets.description: NCAA-prospect autos on paper stock — retail-channel exclusive.
sets.editorial: Retail buyers' NCAA auto access. Same ~100 prospects as Chrome Prospect Autographs but on paper in Value/Bulk. Lower hit rates per format but paper autos have their own collector base.

sets.name: Paper Rookies and Veterans Retail Autographs
sets.description: NBA-side retail paper autos covering rookies and veterans.
sets.editorial: The retail-only path to NBA autos. Tighter odds than Paper Prospect Retail. If you're ripping Value boxes for NBA names, this is the set.

notableAbsences.reason: NBA #3 pick (Philadelphia 76ers) — appears in the base checklist, Chrome Variation, Rookie Red, and multiple inserts but has ZERO autograph cards in the product. Alongside Tre Johnson III and Jeremiah Fears, this points to a likely Panini-exclusive auto contract. Headline structural absence.
notableAbsences.expectedIn: Possible Panini exclusive — unlikely to appear in Bowman/Topps autos this license cycle

notableAbsences.reason: NBA #6 pick (Washington Wizards) — same pattern as Edgecombe: base cards and inserts yes, autos no. Three of the top seven 2025 NBA picks (#3, #6, #7) are missing from the entire auto program.
NBA #7 pick (New Orleans Pelicans) — base and insert presence only, no auto. Completes the #3/#6/#7 trio of top-7 picks absent from Bowman's auto lineup.
Featured prominently on Topps' official education sheet marketing as a top 2026 prospect — missing from both the checklist AND all autograph sets. Possible redemption or signer non-delivery.
notableAbsences.expectedIn: Possible future Chrome Prospects or redemption release

notableAbsences.reason: Twin brother of Cameron, also a Duke freshman and 2026 prospect. Same absence pattern.
notableAbsences.expectedIn: Possible future Chrome Prospects or redemption release

notableAbsences.reason: Notre Dame superstar and one of the most in-demand WCBB names — noticeably absent from the women's auto lineup. Significant omission given the product's dual M/W focus.
notableAbsences.expectedIn: Unclear — check future Bowman releases or Topps Chrome University

notableAbsences.reason: Top 2026 NCAA-M prospect (Florida) — missing from all sets. Would've expected Chrome Prospect Autograph inclusion.
LSU star and notable crossover figure (music + basketball) — missing from the WCBB auto lineup.
2026 NCAA-M prospect with auto-set demand — missing from the Chrome Prospect rotation.
